---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe what you're trying to accomplish and why the current behavior falls short.

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible about the desired behavior.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why they were not chosen.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
